metadata.description: Worldbuilding Architect — grow deep, internally-consistent fictional worlds as a living text codex.

plugins.name: worldbuilding-architect
plugins.description: Build and grow deep, internally-consistent fictional worlds (settings/lore/世界观) as a persistent, ever-expanding text codex: emergent history, names with real provenance, POV-relative geography, multi-worldline (time travel / branching / 收束).
